t: Vitals: A Governed Medallion Lakehouse for Healthcare Data
d: A health-data lakehouse that turns messy FHIR, claims, wearable, and notes data into three trusted outputs — analytics marts, an ML feature store, and a vector index — with de-identification, OMOP standardization, and cross-engine parity testing that caught a real de-id gap.

t: Building a Self-Managing MBTA On-Time-Performance Lakehouse (Databricks + GCP)
d: A live transit-data lakehouse that ingests MBTA real-time feeds, computes on-time performance, and runs, heals, and improves itself — with an agentic layer that writes its own insights and opens pull requests.

t: Building a Customer Analytics Pipeline with Airflow, dbt and Spark
d: A production-grade ELT pipeline that automates daily identification of high-value customers using Apache Airflow, dbt-spark, and Apache Iceberg.

t: Analytics Engineering with dbt: From Raw Data to Business Intelligence
d: A comprehensive guide to implementing modern analytics engineering practices using dbt, BigQuery, and Looker Studio. Learn to build scalable data transformation pipelines with dimensional modeling, testing, and deployment strategies.

t: Building a Data Pipeline with BigQuery: From Storage to Analytics
d: A comprehensive guide to implementing a scalable, cost-effective data pipeline and warehouse using Google BigQuery, featuring external tables, partitioning, clustering, and performance optimization with NYC taxi data.

t: Orchestrating Data Pipelines with Apache Airflow: A Comprehensive Guide
d: A practical guide to building and orchestrating robust data pipelines using Apache Airflow, covering local, cloud (GCP), and Kubernetes deployments.
A step by step guide of a simple data pipeline

t: The Role of AI in Modern Data Architectures
d: How artificial intelligence is transforming data systems and workflows
Best practices for creating efficient and scalable ML pipelines
An introduction to the fundamentals of data engineering
Introduction and overview of what you can find on this site
